# base ‚Äî the uikit.studio starter canvas

> A neutral, runnable canvas for building a new uikit.studio UI kit. Not a finished
> design ‚Äî it is the plumbing (routing, i18n + RTL, dark mode, a token system,
> primitive components) wired up so you can paint a brand-new kit on top.

This file is **agent-readable**. Unlike a finished kit, base has **no design to copy** ‚Äî
its job is to be *built into* one.

## Kit type
`uikit.json` carries a `type`: **`app`** (default ‚Äî landing ¬∑ pricing ¬∑ dashboard ¬∑
components) or **`ecommerce`** (storefront ¬∑ products (search + filter) ¬∑ product detail ¬∑
cart/checkout ¬∑ components; Salla/Zid/Shopify-style for the Saudi/Khaliji market). The
runnable app renders the matching page set from `type`. Scaffold an ecommerce kit with
`uikit new <base> <dir> --type ecommerce`; build it against
[`prompts/build.ecommerce.md`](./prompts/build.ecommerce.md).

## If a developer asked you to build a kit here
1. Read the spec for the kit's type ‚Äî **[`prompts/build.md`](./prompts/build.md)** (app) or
   **[`prompts/build.ecommerce.md`](./prompts/build.ecommerce.md)** (ecommerce) ‚Äî for *how*
   to build it the uikit way (original ¬∑ full design system ¬∑ full pages ¬∑ responsive ¬∑
   EN/AR + RTL + dark ¬∑ every value defined in tokens + README + `uikit.json`).
2. Read **[`AGENTS.md`](./AGENTS.md)** ‚Äî the short version of the same rules.
3. Work theme-first: `design/theme.css` (Tailwind v4 `@theme`) + `design/tokens.json` ‚Üí
   components in `react/src/components/` ‚Üí pages in `react/src/routes/*`.

## What you must output (agent-ready by default)
The finished kit must itself be agent-ready, so other developers can reproduce it by URL:
- `AGENTS.md` + `llms.txt` at the repo root (this scaffold drops starters in place).
- `uikit.json` describing the real surface; `npx uikit-studio validate` passing.
- When listed on uikit.studio, the gallery generates `/kit/<id>/llms.txt` + `/manifest.json`
  from your entry ‚Äî enabling *"build me a website with this design: uikit.studio/kit/<id>"*.

## How this base is wired
- `design/theme.css` ‚Äî Tailwind v4 `@theme` tokens (light), `.dark` block, `[dir=rtl]` font swap.
- `design/tokens.json` ‚Äî the same tokens in W3C DTCG form (keep in sync).
- `react/src/{i18n,lib,components,blocks,routes}/` ‚Äî provider, `cn`, primitives, sections, pages.

## Start
```bash
npx uikit-studio new https://github.com/uikit-studio/base-uikit my-kit
cd my-kit/react && pnpm install && pnpm dev
```

Gallery: <https://uikit.studio> ¬∑ Submit: <https://uikit.studio/submit>
